artPrompt: A vast circular municipal rotunda seen from below, towering beige columns and a hazy domed ceiling dissolving into cold ivory and cyan light, a lonely polished floor reflecting blurred lamps, rows of filing cabinets receding into mist, a faint arcane shimmer drifting up from blank smudged forms on a counter, no figures, only echoing hollow stillness and a tender melancholy, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: City Hall Rotunda
text:
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
{1}, {T}: Whenever an opponent rolled a die or flipped a coin this turn, draw a card. (The dome echoes with the sound of other people's gambling.)
flavorText: Every footstep echoes for nine seconds. Every decision echoes for nine years.
